creator: manas@bhatnagar.net.in
text:
Main error, which is also logged by postgresql:

2019-01-23T11:00:39.433Z 47612 TID-8174rms WARN: ActiveRecord::StatementInvalid: PG::SyntaxError: ERROR:  syntax error at or near "SELECT"
LINE 4: ( SELECT updated_at,
          ^
: UPDATE merge_request_metrics
SET (latest_closed_at,
   latest_closed_by_id) =
( SELECT updated_at,
         author_id
 FROM events
 WHERE target_id = merge_request_id
   AND target_type = 'MergeRequest'
   AND action = 3
 ORDER BY id DESC
 LIMIT 1 ),
   merged_by_id =
( SELECT author_id
 FROM events
 WHERE target_id = merge_request_id
   AND target_type = 'MergeRequest'
   AND action = 7
 ORDER BY id DESC
 LIMIT 1 )
WHERE merge_request_id BETWEEN 1 AND 4

2019-01-23T11:00:39.433Z 47612 TID-8174rms BackgroundMigrationWorker JID-36c4882cb7333f36aea02bf3 INFO: fail: 0.007 sec
